code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  mut has = false
  mut best = 0
  mut cur = ""
  while i <= n
    let at_end = i == n
    mut is_space = true
    if not at_end
      let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(v)
        v
      when None
        32
      end
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
        is_space = true
      else
        is_space = false
        cur = "#{cur}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
      end
    end
    if (at_end or is_space) and not string.is_empty(cur)
      match string.parse_int(cur)
      when Some(v)
        if v > 0
          if not has or v > best
            best = v
            has = true
          end
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      cur = ""
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if has
    print("max=#{best}")
  else
    print("none")
  end
end
